title: Productization audit harness
objective: Add a Productization Harness skeleton for UX, accessibility, responsive, performance, security, and release-readiness audits.

acceptanceCriteria.text: Define audit categories: UX, a11y, responsive, performance, security, content, release-readiness.
Add a command or template hook that produces productization-report.md from checklist inputs and run artifacts.
Do not auto-fix by default; create hardening backlog items instead.
Add fixture-based tests for report generation.

expectedArtifacts: tests or fixtures when behavior changes
updated documentation if user-facing behavior changes

koGuide.요약: 이 작업은 Codex가 Dev Container 안에서 자동 구현할 수 있도록 설계된 단계별 task packet입니다.
